source_name: ABS Energy Account Australia — household consumption

fields.scope_note: ABS Energy Account Australia (cat. 4604.0) reports household final energy consumption by fuel. Cross-reference DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics for grid-side totals (the two should reconcile but use slightly different methodologies).
fields.primary_source_document: ABS Energy Account Australia (annual). Also: ABS Household Energy Consumption Survey (less frequent).
fields.keying_plan: Key annual household electricity PJ and household gas PJ. Optionally key the average kWh/household figure that is widely cited in retail-pricing context.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual household electricity and gas consumption from ABS Energy Account Australia. Households are typically ~25-30% of national electricity end-use; cite the exact year and methodology.
citation: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Energy Account Australia (abs.gov.au).
